etymology.description: Depicts four ๅนบ(ๅนบ) (yฤo, "silk") -> incorporated into ็นผ(็นผ) (jรฌ, "continue") as a phonetic element
etymology.interpretation: ใกญ(jรฌ) is an ancient form of ็นผ(็นผ) (jรฌ, "continue") and serves as the phonetic component in the character ็นผ(็นผ), which combines with ็ณธ(็ณธ) (mรฌ, "silk; thread") to denote 'continuation' as in 'continuing the silk thread'.
